items.caption: A logo for "the famous grouse," which includes a stylized illustration of a bird, likely a grouse, set against a white background. the bird is depicted in a side profile with its head turned slightly towards the viewer, showcasing a red crest. below the bird, the text "the famous grouse" is written in a serif font, with "the famous" in a smaller size and "grouse" in a larger, bolder font. the text and the bird are colored in a gold hue, which stands out against the white background. the overall design is simple and elegant, with a clear emphasis on the brand name.
